title: Security: Content-Type x-mixed-replace can be abused to bypass CSP on iOS
bounty_rationale: $2,000 for report of low-to-moderate impact exploit mitigation bypass
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
A page that responds with the Content-Type multipart/x-mixed-replace can bypass the same requests CSP header by overwriting the CSP in one of the response parts  
  
Given a server response like this  
```  
:status: 200  
Content-Type: multipart/x-mixed-replace; boundar
